description: Removes a manual 144-byte message truncation workaround, on the premise that the open.mp runtime's SendClientMessage no longer imposes the classic SA-MP length limit.

origin.notes: Illustrative migration based on general SA-MP/open.mp migration guidance about relaxed message-length limits. Not verified against a primary open.mp changelog in this environment (no network access); confirm against pawn-api/open.mp docs before treating as an authoritative fact rather than an illustrative codemod shape.

expected.notes: This migration is not implemented yet. The pair records the intended source edit.
